productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Formal Black Shoes
description: This stylish pair in a tapered square toe box design from lee cooper makes a trendy statement combined with superior performance. It&rsquo s a great combination of enhanced cushioning and durability. These shoes give superior traction and protection to the feet, while remaining comfortable and stylish enough for formal and semi-formal wear. You can team these with pants or chinos and shirts for a well groomed look.UpperLeather uppers for better comfort and durabilityStitch detailing for greater reinforcement and styleTapered square toe box for more comfortElasticated insert behind the tongue for easy insertion and removal of the feetPadded collar for extra comfortLogo name tab embossed on the sideLeather lining for greater comfortMidsoleShock-absorbing EVA midsole for enhanced comfortCushioned footbed for all day comfortOutsoleTPR outsole for durability and higher abrasion resistanceWave ridge pattern for better gripSlight heel for ergonomic comfortWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
